benefits.description: In-law experienced life-changing results on GLP peptide over 6 months

protocol_notes: OP ordered grey market peptides twice. First order ~$600 for ~5 peptides/~50 vials; paid ~$300-$350 per sample for third-party testing, totaling roughly 3x cost of peptides. Second order used group testing but independently re-tested one vial, which returned different results from the group COA. A second group member also re-tested with the original lab and got different results. OP advocates for home testing kits for toxins/contaminants.
